column5: Brown, gravelly silty medium to coarse SAND. (FILL)
moderately weak to moderately strong, brownish pink spotted black and white, moderately decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE.

Strong, pinkish grey spotted black and white, slightly decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE with widely to medium spaced, extremely narrow, rough planar, limonite stained and clean joints, dipping 10 degrees-20 degrees.
